_comment: Tecnologías de mejora de unidad (Unit Upgrades) GENÉRICAS de TI4 (Base + PoK). Las unit upgrades de FACCIÓN (ej: Sol's Spec Ops II) van en el archivo de cada facción, no acá.

_schema.name: nombre oficial en inglés
_schema.unitType: tipo de unidad que mejora: infantry | destroyer | cruiser | pds | carrier | dreadnought | fighter | spaceDock
_schema.effect: stats completos de la unidad mejorada + texto del efecto

unitUpgrades.name: Infantry II
unitUpgrades.effect: Upgrades all your Infantry. Cost: 1(x2) | Combat: 7 | After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. On a 6, place this unit in your reinforcements instead of removing it from the board.

unitUpgrades.name: Destroyer II
unitUpgrades.effect: Upgrades all your Destroyers. Cost: 1 | Combat: 9 | Move: 2 | Capacity: 1 | ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE x3 | SUSTAIN DAMAGE.

unitUpgrades.name: Cruiser II
unitUpgrades.effect: Upgrades all your Cruisers. Cost: 2 | Combat: 6 | Move: 3 | Capacity: 3.

unitUpgrades.name: PDS II
unitUpgrades.effect: Upgrades all your PDS. SPACE CANNON 5 | Your SPACE CANNON weapons may now be used against ships in adjacent systems.

unitUpgrades.name: Carrier II
unitUpgrades.effect: Upgrades all your Carriers. Cost: 3 | Combat: 9 | Move: 2 | Capacity: 6 | SUSTAIN DAMAGE.

unitUpgrades.name: Dreadnought II
unitUpgrades.effect: Upgrades all your Dreadnoughts. Cost: 4 | Combat: 5 | Move: 2 | Capacity: 1 | SUSTAIN DAMAGE | BOMBARDMENT 4 | After this unit moves, it may use BOMBARDMENT against each planet in the system it moved into.

unitUpgrades.name: Fighter II
unitUpgrades.effect: Upgrades all your Fighters. Cost: 1(x3) | Combat: 8 | Move: 2 | Capacity: 1.

unitUpgrades.name: Space Dock II
unitUpgrades.effect: Upgrades all your Space Docks. PRODUCTION: (Planet resource value + 3) | Your PRODUCTION ability does not produce excess units.

unitUpgrades.name: War Sun
unitUpgrades.effect: Unlocks the War Sun unit. Cost: 12 | Combat: 3(x3) | Move: 2 | Capacity: 6 | SUSTAIN DAMAGE | BOMBARDMENT 3(x3) | Your War Suns do not require PRODUCTION to be placed; instead, place them from your reinforcements.
unitUpgrades._note: A diferencia de las demás unit upgrades, War Sun no mejora una unidad I existente: desbloquea la unidad War Sun desde cero (ninguna facción excepto Embers of Muaat la tiene impresa en su hoja inicial).
